---
name: Design discussion
about: A non-trivial design choice or refinement that may need an ADR
title: "design: short description"
labels: ["kind:design"]
assignees: []
---

## Context

What's the situation that motivates the discussion?

## Options under consideration

- **Option A:** …
- **Option B:** …
- **Option C:** …

## Trade-offs

Per option: what becomes easier; what becomes harder; what risks introduced.

## Proposed decision

Your current preference, if you have one. Acceptable to write "no preference yet — soliciting input."

## ADR?

Will this decision warrant a permanent ADR? (Yes if it crosses module boundaries, affects public contracts, or chooses between credible alternatives. See `docs/adr/README.md`.)
